_comment: Story 1.6 AC5: pa11y-ci config. Runs both the axe runner (WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA via AxeBuilder tag set) and the htmlcs runner (HTML_CodeSniffer — WCAG 2.0 AA only; htmlcs has no 2.1/2.2 rules). htmlcs is *complementary coverage* (structural checks axe sometimes misses), NOT a mirror of AXE_WCAG_TAGS in src/lib/a11y-config.ts. See docs/a11y-gates.md §Why two runners. Keep `standard` at WCAG2AA — it only affects the htmlcs runner.
_ignore_comment: Intentionally empty at Story 1.6. Add entries ONLY after filing an issue per the appeal process in docs/a11y-gates.md §Appeal process. Each entry must be a valid axe rule ID or htmlcs error code (e.g. 'color-contrast' or 'WCAG2AA.Principle1.Guideline1_4.1_4_3.G18.Fail').
_urls_comment: Target the MVP surface directly. `/` redirects to `/engagements` per the 2026-05-23 cleanup; we audit `/engagements` itself instead of following the 307 because puppeteer's extra-HTTP-headers don't reliably stick across redirects, and the strategist middleware gates `/engagements` on `x-deployai-role` — without it, the page is a bare 403 plain-text response with no `<html lang>` / `<title>`. Tenant header matches the seed default in case any BFF actor-load fires during render.
